languages.text: {n}Вольный Торговец отмахивается от вас, словно отгоняя назойливую муху, и на землю срываются несколько капель машинного масла.{/n} "Оставьте лесть при себе".
{n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."
languages.original_text: {n}Вольный Торговец отмахивается от вас, словно отгоняя назойливую муху, и на землю срываются несколько капель машинного масла.{/n} "Оставьте лесть при себе".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."

languages.text: {n}行商浪人挥了挥手，像是在驱赶一只烦人的苍蝇，几滴机油随之溅落在地。{/n}“少拍马屁。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人挥了挥手，像是在驱赶一只烦人的苍蝇，几滴机油随之溅落在地。{/n}“少拍马屁。”

languages.text: {n}Le libre-marchand vous congédie d'un geste méprisant, comme s'il chassait une mouche importune, répandant au passage des gouttes d'huile de machine sur le sol autour de lui.{/n} « Épargnez-moi vos flatteries. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le libre-marchand vous congédie d'un geste méprisant, comme s'il chassait une mouche importune, répandant au passage des gouttes d'huile de machine sur le sol autour de lui.{/n} « Épargnez-moi vos flatteries. »

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacir, sinir bozucu bir sineği kovuyormuşçasına seni başından savarken etrafa makine yağı damlaları saçılıyor.{/n} "Dalkavukluğun lüzumu yok."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hür Tacir, sinir bozucu bir sineği kovuyormuşçasına seni başından savarken etrafa makine yağı damlaları saçılıyor.{/n} "Dalkavukluğun lüzumu yok."

languages.text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente te despide con un gesto, como si espantara una mosca, y salpica el suelo de aceite para máquinas al hacerlo.{/n} «Ahórrese las lisonjas».
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente te despide con un gesto, como si espantara una mosca, y salpica el suelo de aceite para máquinas al hacerlo.{/n} «Ahórrese las lisonjas».

languages.text: {n}Als der Freihändler abwinkt, als wolle er eine lästige Fliege verscheuchen, tropft auslaufendes Maschinenöl auf den Boden.{/n} "Spart Euch Eure Schmeicheleien."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Als der Freihändler abwinkt, als wolle er eine lästige Fliege verscheuchen, tropft auslaufendes Maschinenöl auf den Boden.{/n} "Spart Euch Eure Schmeicheleien."

languages.text: {n}ローグ・トレーダーは、煩わしい蠅でも追い払うように君を手で払いのけ、その拍子に機械油の滴を地面に散らす。{/n}「世辞は、自分の胸にしまっておけ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader waves you off as if shooing away a bothersome fly, scattering drops of machine oil on the ground as he does so.{/n} "Keep your flattery to yourself."
